{{Quote|Everything has a price. There are times... it's just too high.|Imara Vex|<ref name="Hunters">''[[Star Wars: Hunters]]''</ref>}}
The '''Imperial Inquisitor''' was a costume owned by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Imara Vex]] that she could don for the [[Hunters of the Outer Rim]] competition on [[Vespaara]] as an alternative to her [[Bounty Hunter (Imara Vex)|standard costume]]. The [[Clothing|outfit]] and [[armor]] featured a [[Color|dark]] appearance with glowing red elements, including the visor of the [[helmet]], and cylindrical [[shoulder-mounted armament]] housing a golden payload.<ref name="Hunters" />

{{Clothes-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Imperial Inquisitor costume was added to the [[Zynga]] video game ''[[Star Wars: Hunters]]''<ref name="Hunters" /> as a costume in<ref name="ArenaPass">{{YouTube|video=Px04fMCS0HI|text=Every NEW Arena Pass & Ranked Cosmetic! | Star Wars Hunters|channel=@SplitScreenSW|name=Split Screen: Star Wars|date=2024-04-01|archivedate=20260109180050}}</ref> the 0.20 arena pass of the [[March 28]], [[2024]] update during the game's soft launch.<ref name="MarchUpdate">{{Hunters|url=news/game-update-march-28th-2024|text=Game Update: March 28, 2024}}</ref> The game soft launched on [[November 16]], [[2021]],<ref name="Soft launch">{{Twitter|ZyngaStarWars|status/1460656552734605317|[[Zynga]] Star Wars|date=2021-11-16|quote=We are excited to announce Star Wars: Hunters is now entering soft launch and is available on Android for players in India, Philippines, Malaysia & Indonesia.|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/InyRJ|archivefile=File:ZyngaStarWars-SoftLaunchDate-Twitter.png|nolive=1}}</ref> released [[June 4]], 2024,<ref name="HuntersRelease">{{SWYouTube|4dZcq6m3y40|Star Wars: Hunters Launch Date Reveal Trailer|date=2024-04-30}}</ref> and ultimately shut down on [[October 1]], [[2025]].<ref name="Offline">{{Hunters|url=news/sunset-on-vespaara|text=Sunset on Vespaara}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Hunters]]'' {{1st}}
